languages.text: "Сим свидетельствую, что Вольный Торговец благословлен Омниссией, и истины Бога-Машины осеняют путь {mf|его|ее}". {n}Эоганн широко разводит мехадендриты, между которыми с шипением проскакивает искра Движущей Силы. Публика благоговейно замирает... затем взрывается ликованием.{/n}

"Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God shine upon {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Сим свидетельствую, что Вольный Торговец благословлен Омниссией, и истины Бога-Машины осеняют путь {mf|его|ее}". {n}Эоганн широко разводит мехадендриты, между которыми с шипением проскакивает искра Движущей Силы. Публика благоговейно замирает... затем взрывается ликованием.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God enlighteneth {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}

"Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God enlighteneth {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}

The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}

"Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God shine upon {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}

languages.text: «Por la presente soy testigo de que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente goza de la bendición del Omnissiah y de que las verdades del Dios Máquina iluminan su camino». {n}Eogunn extiende sus mecadendritas, haciendo que una chispa de Fuerza Motriz salte entre ellas. Los congregados, asombrados, quedan inmóviles un momento y luego empiezan a vitorear el espectáculo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God shine upon {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Por la presente soy testigo de que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente goza de la bendición del Omnissiah y de que las verdades del Dios Máquina iluminan su camino». {n}Eogunn extiende sus mecadendritas, haciendo que una chispa de Fuerza Motriz salte entre ellas. Los congregados, asombrados, quedan inmóviles un momento y luego empiezan a vitorear el espectáculo.{/n}

languages.text: “我在此见证，行商浪人已蒙受欧姆尼赛亚的赐福，万机之神的真理照耀着{mf|他|她}的道路。”{n}伊奥贡展开他的机械触须，源力嘶嘶作响的火花在其间跃动。在场众人先是因敬畏而陷入寂静，随后便爆发出狂喜的欢呼声。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God shine upon {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我在此见证，行商浪人已蒙受欧姆尼赛亚的赐福，万机之神的真理照耀着{mf|他|她}的道路。”{n}伊奥贡展开他的机械触须，源力嘶嘶作响的火花在其间跃动。在场众人先是因敬畏而陷入寂静，随后便爆发出狂喜的欢呼声。{/n}

languages.text: "Hiermit bezeuge ich, dass {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} vom Omnissiah gesegnet ist und die Wahrheiten des Maschinengottes {mf|seinen|ihren} Weg erhellen." {n}Eogunn breitet seine Mechadendriten aus und ein zischender Funke der Antriebskraft springt zwischen ihnen über. Die Menge erstarrt in frommer Ehrfurcht ... und bricht dann in Jubel aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God shine upon {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Hiermit bezeuge ich, dass {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} vom Omnissiah gesegnet ist und die Wahrheiten des Maschinengottes {mf|seinen|ihren} Weg erhellen." {n}Eogunn breitet seine Mechadendriten aus und ein zischender Funke der Antriebskraft springt zwischen ihnen über. Die Menge erstarrt in frommer Ehrfurcht ... und bricht dann in Jubel aus.{/n}

languages.text: « J'atteste sur ma foi que {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} est {mf|béni|bénie} de l'Empereur-Dieu et que les vérités du Dieu-Machine guident ses pas. » {n}Eogunn ouvre grand ses mécadendrites alors qu'une étincelle crépitante de Force Motrice jaillit entre elles. La foule émerveillée se fige dans un accès d'extase religieuse... avant de laisser éclater sa joie.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God shine upon {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}

La foule émerveillée se fige dans un accès d'extase religieuse... avant de laisser éclater sa joie.{/n}

languages.text: "İşbu vesileyle tanıklık ederim ki Hür Tacir, Hermesih tarafından kutsanmıştır ve Makine Tanrı'nın gerçekleri onun yolunu aydınlatmaktadır." {n}Eogunn, mekadentritlerini iki yana açarken aralarından Devinim Gücü'nün tıslayan kıvılcımları sıçrıyor. Topluluk, dindar bir huşu içinde donakalıyor... Ardından coşkulu tezahüratlara başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God shine upon {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}

Topluluk, dindar bir huşu içinde donakalıyor... Ardından coşkulu tezahüratlara başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「ここに、私は証言します。このローグトレーダーはオムニシアの祝福を受けており、機械神の実体がその道に光を放つことを。」{n}イオグンはメカデンドライトを大きく広げ、モティブフォースの火花がその間を飛び跳ねる。集まった人々は畏敬の念に打たれ、静まり返る。そして歓喜に沸き上がる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Hereby do I bear witness, that the Rogue Trader is blessed by the Omnissiah, and the truths of the Machine God shine upon {mf|his|her} path." {n}Eogunn spreads his mechadendrites wide as a hissing spark of the Motive Force leaps between them. The gathering freezes in pious awe... then erupts into rapturous cheers.{/n}
